name: mathlib-ml-arch
description: Keeps ML architecture reviews honest about verified mathlib support, structural type/gradient risks, engineering inference, and empirical gaps.

interface.shortDescription: Separate structural findings, verified support, and empirical claims
interface.longDescription: Supports two companion flows: typed architecture tomography for structural analysis, and mathlib-backed verification for locally checkable formal subclaims. Structural findings never count as Lean verification.
defaultPrompt: Decompose this ML architecture into typed states, matrices, invariants, shortcut risks, and formalization candidates
Check whether this workspace can reach a locally verified mathlib claim
Audit this ML architecture and separate structural findings, verified support, engineering inference, and empirical gaps
